version_pin_rationale: waybar 0.9.9-1 is the jammy universe release. Wayland status bar. Spec lists it as part of the DE-H1 user-facing surface ('exec-once = waybar' in /etc/hyprland.conf). DEPENDS: list is large (gtk-3, gtkmm, glibmm, jsoncpp, mpdclient, pulse, libnl, dbusmenu-gtk3, libfmt8, libsigc++, libspdlog1-fmt8) — all expected on the jammy host (DE0-D / DE0-G precedent). Waybar systemd user unit ships at usr/lib/systemd/user/waybar.service but is NOT enabled by DE-H1 (the Hyprland config 'exec-once = waybar' invokes it from the compositor instead).
